# chord-overlay

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sonata Overlay: labels chord annotations along the timeline. Requires the time-axis capability, so it renders on the piano roll and any future time-based display.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Sonata.Overlay` "chord-overlay" → `ChordOverlay`
  - Uses: `apps/sonata/rich/chord-label.useChordDisplayMode`, `apps/sonata/shell.Sonata`, `apps/sonata/shell.useSonata`, `primitives/css/pin.Pin`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
